title: Unify coordination binding, plan attribution, and delegated-work semantics
summary: Delegated work now inherits parent coordination context by default, coordination mutations rebind active work/task state after plan and task transitions, and the session seed persists those bindings.

acceptance.label: Coordination tasks bind into work context without being the only provenance carrier.
Delegated child work can reference parent work cleanly without depending on runtime-only bootstrap history.
Plan and coordination creation events are attributable to the declared originating work.
